functions.name: click
functions.description: Clicks on a specified element on the page.

parameters.name: elementid
parameters.description: The ID of the element to click.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the click action is complete.

functions.name: close
functions.description: Closes the current page.

functions.name: closeBrowserInstance
functions.description: Close a browser instance

returns.description: True if successful, false if instance not found

functions.name: enter
functions.description: Simulates the Enter key press on the current page.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the Enter action is complete.

functions.name: executeOnInstance
functions.description: Execute action on specific browser instance

parameters.name: instanceId
parameters.description: The instance ID to execute on

returns.description: The operation result

functions.name: extractText
functions.description: Extracts text from the current page.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the extracted text.

functions.name: getBrowserInfo
functions.description: Retrieves browser info like height width scrollx scrolly of the current page.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the browser info.

functions.name: getBrowserInstance
functions.description: Get a specific browser instance by ID

returns.description: Browser instance information or null if not found

functions.name: getContent
functions.description: Retrieves the content of the current page.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the content.

functions.name: getHTML
functions.description: Retrieves the HTML content of the current page.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the HTML content.

functions.name: getMarkdown
functions.description: Retrieves the Markdown content of the current page.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the Markdown content.

functions.name: getPDF
functions.description: Retrieves the PDF content of the current page.

functions.name: getSnapShot
functions.description: Retrieves the snapshot of the current page.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the snapshot.

functions.name: getUrl
functions.description: Retrieves the current URL of the browser's active page.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the URL.

functions.name: goToPage
functions.description: Navigates to a specified URL.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when navigation is complete.

functions.name: listBrowserInstances
functions.description: List all open browser instances

returns.description: Array of browser instance information

functions.name: newPage
functions.description: Opens a new page in the browser.

functions.name: openNewBrowserInstance
functions.description: Open a new browser instance

returns.description: The new instance ID

functions.name: pdfToText
functions.description: Converts the PDF content of the current page to text.

functions.name: screenshot
functions.description: Takes a screenshot of the current page.

functions.name: scroll
functions.description: Scrolls the current page in a specified direction by a specified number of pixels.

parameters.name: pixels
parameters.description: The number of pixels to scroll.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the scroll action is complete.

functions.name: search
functions.description: Performs a search on the current page using a specified query.

parameters.name: elementid
parameters.description: The ID of the element to perform the search in.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the search results.

functions.name: setActiveBrowserInstance
functions.description: Set the active browser instance

parameters.name: instanceId
parameters.description: The instance ID to set as active

returns.description: True if successful, false if instance not found

functions.name: type
functions.description: Types text into a specified element on the page.

parameters.name: elementid
parameters.description: The ID of the element to type into.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the typing action is complete.

functions.name: createEvent
functions.description: Create a new calendar event

returns.description: Promise resolving to the created event

functions.name: deleteEvent
functions.description: Delete a calendar event

returns.description: Promise resolving to deletion confirmation

functions.name: getEvent
functions.description: Get a single calendar event by ID

returns.description: Promise resolving to the event

functions.name: getEventsInRange
functions.description: Get events within a specific date range

returns.description: Promise resolving to events in range

functions.name: getStatus
functions.description: Get the calendar scheduler status

returns.description: Promise resolving to scheduler status information

functions.name: getTriggeredEvents
functions.description: Get triggered events (events whose start time has passed)

returns.description: Promise resolving to triggered events

functions.name: getTriggeredEventsAndMarkComplete
functions.description: Get triggered events and mark them all as complete in one operation

returns.description: Promise resolving to the events that were retrieved and marked complete

functions.name: getUpcomingEvents
functions.description: Get upcoming events within a specified time window

returns.description: Promise resolving to upcoming events

functions.name: listEvents
functions.description: List calendar events with optional filters

returns.description: Promise resolving to list of events

functions.name: markEventComplete
functions.description: Mark a single event as complete

returns.description: Promise resolving to the completed event

functions.name: markEventsComplete
functions.description: Mark multiple events as complete

returns.description: Promise resolving to the completed events

functions.name: rsvp
functions.description: RSVP to a calendar event

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Parameters including eventId, participantId, and status

returns.description: Promise resolving to the updated event

functions.name: updateEvent
functions.description: Update an existing calendar event

returns.description: Promise resolving to the updated event

functions.name: addToAgentState
functions.description: Adds a key-value pair to the agent's state on the server via WebSocket.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key to add to the agent's state.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value associated with the key.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response to the addition request.

functions.name: getAgentState
functions.description: Retrieves the current state of the agent from the server via WebSocket.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the agent's state.

functions.name: getApplicationState
functions.description: Retrieves the current application state from the server via WebSocket.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the application state.

functions.name: getProjectState
functions.description: Retrieves the current project state from the server via WebSocket.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the project's state.

functions.name: updateProjectState
functions.description: Updates the project state on the server via WebSocket.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key to update in the project state.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to set for the key.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response to the update request.

functions.name: checkForSteeringMessage
functions.description: Checks if any steering message has been received.

returns.description: The message data if available, or null

functions.name: getChatHistory
functions.description: Retrieves the chat history from the server.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with an array of ChatMessage objects representing the chat history.

functions.name: onSteeringMessageReceived
functions.description: Waits for a steering message.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the message data

functions.name: processFinished
functions.description:
Stops the ongoing process.
Sends a specific message to the server to stop the process.

functions.name: processStarted
functions.description: Notifies the server that a process has started and sets up a listener for stopProcessClicked events.

parameters.name: onStopClicked
parameters.description: Callback function to handle stop process events.

returns.description: An object containing a stopProcess method.

functions.name: sendConfirmationRequest
functions.description: Sends a confirmation request to the server with two options: Yes or No.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the server's response.

functions.name: sendMessage
functions.description: Sends a message through the WebSocket connection.

functions.name: sendNotificationEvent
functions.description: Sends a notification event to the server.

parameters.name: notificationMessage
parameters.description: The message to be sent in the notification.

functions.name: setRequestHandler
functions.description: Sets a global request handler for all incoming messages

functions.name: stopProcess
functions.description:
Stops the ongoing process.
Sends a specific message to the server to stop the process.

functions.name: waitforReply
functions.description: Waits for a reply to a sent message.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The message for which a reply is expected.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the reply.

functions.name: activateThreadStep
functions.description:
Activates a step in a chat thread.

Marks the specified step as the currently active step, indicating
that work is in progress on this step.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the step to activate

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the activated ChatThreadStep

functions.name: addSteeringStep
functions.description:
Adds a steering step to a thread.

Creates a steering step that guides the agent's behavior during
execution, providing directional instructions or constraints.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created SteeringStep

functions.name: addStep
functions.description:
Adds a step to a thread via the add-step endpoint.

An alternative method for adding steps that accepts the thread ID
as part of the request body rather than the URL path.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The step addition request including thread ID and step data

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created ChatThreadStep

functions.name: addThreadStep
functions.description:
Adds a step to a chat thread.

Creates a new step within the thread's step sequence, representing
a discrete unit of work or progress in the conversation.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepData
parameters.description: The step definition including type and content

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created ChatThreadStep

functions.name: autoUpdateThreadName
functions.description:
Automatically generates and updates the thread name based on content.

Uses the user's message or conversation context to generate a
descriptive name for the thread, replacing any existing name.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the name has been auto-updated

functions.name: clearThreadsMemory
functions.description:
Clears all threads from memory.

Removes all thread data from the in-memory cache, typically used
when switching projects to ensure a clean state.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the memory has been cleared

functions.name: completeThreadStep
functions.description:
Completes a step in a chat thread.

Marks the specified step as completed, optionally recording
completion details such as the outcome or output.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the step to complete

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the completed ChatThreadStep

functions.name: createRemoteTask
functions.description:
Creates a new remote task.

Registers a task that will be executed by a remote agent or service,
tracking it within the chat context.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created task data

functions.name: createScheduledTask
functions.description:
Creates a new scheduled task.

Registers a task that will be executed at a future time, tracked
within the chat context.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created task data

functions.name: createThread
functions.description:
Creates a new chat thread.

Provisions a new thread with the specified configuration, without
the automatic lookup behavior of initiateNewThread.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created ChatThreadInfo

functions.name: deleteSteeringStep
functions.description:
Deletes a steering step from a thread.

Removes the specified steering instruction from the thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: steeringStepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the steering step to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the steering step has been deleted

functions.name: deleteTaskStep
functions.description:
Deletes a step from a thread via the task endpoint.

Removes a specific step from a thread's step sequence, accessed
through the task management API path.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the step to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the step has been deleted

functions.name: deleteThread
functions.description:
Deletes a chat thread.

Permanently removes the specified thread and all its associated
messages and steps.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the thread has been deleted

functions.name: deleteThreadStep
functions.description:
Deletes a step from a chat thread.

Removes the specified step from the thread's step sequence.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the step to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the step has been deleted

functions.name: getActiveThreadStep
functions.description:
Retrieves the currently active step for a thread.

Returns the step that is currently in progress, or null if no
step is active.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the active ChatThreadStep or null

functions.name: getMessages
functions.description:
Retrieves all messages for a specific thread.

Returns the complete message history for the given thread,
ordered chronologically.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ChatMessage objects

functions.name: getSteeringSteps
functions.description:
Retrieves all steering steps for a thread.

Returns the list of steering instructions that have been added
to guide agent behavior in the thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of SteeringStep objects

functions.name: getTasks
functions.description:
Retrieves all chat tasks.

Returns the list of tasks that have been created through the
chat system.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of task objects

functions.name: getTaskSteps
functions.description:
Retrieves steps for a thread via the task endpoint.

Returns the step sequence for a thread, accessed through the
task management API path.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ChatThreadStep objects

functions.name: getThreadInitiated
functions.description:
Checks whether a thread has been initiated.

Returns a boolean indicating if the thread has gone through the
initiation process and is ready for interaction.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an object with an `initiated` boolean flag

functions.name: getThreadsInfo
functions.description:
Retrieves information for all chat threads.

Returns summary information for every thread in the system,
suitable for populating a thread list or sidebar.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ChatThreadInfo objects

functions.name: getThreadSteps
functions.description:
Retrieves all steps for a chat thread.

Returns the complete step sequence for the given thread, showing
the progression of work within the conversation.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ChatThreadStep objects

functions.name: hideThread
functions.description:
Hides a thread from the user interface.

Removes the thread from the visible thread list without deleting it.
The thread data is preserved and can be restored later.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the thread has been hidden

functions.name: initiateNewThread
functions.description:
Initiates a new chat thread or retrieves an existing one.

Creates a new thread if one doesn't exist for the given context,
or returns the existing thread. This is the primary entry point
for starting a conversation.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the ChatThreadInfo for the new or existing thread

functions.name: initThread
functions.description:
Initializes a chat thread.

An alias for  that creates or retrieves
a thread based on the provided parameters.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the ChatThreadInfo

functions.name: removeThread
functions.description:
Removes a thread.

Removes the specified thread from the chat system. This is a
soft-delete that marks the thread as removed.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the thread has been removed

functions.name: setActiveThread
functions.description:
Sets the active chat thread.

Switches the current focus to the specified thread, making it the
primary conversation context for subsequent operations.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the active thread has been set

functions.name: storeMessage
functions.description:
Stores a new message in a chat thread.

Persists a message to the thread's message history, recording
who sent it and its content.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the stored ChatMessage

functions.name: switchThread
functions.description:
Switches to a different chat thread.

Changes the active conversation context to the specified thread,
triggering any associated UI updates.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The thread identifier to switch to

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the switch is complete

functions.name: syncThreads
functions.description:
Synchronizes threads from the thread store to the chat manager.

Ensures that the in-memory chat manager is up-to-date with the
persisted thread store, resolving any inconsistencies.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when synchronization is complete

functions.name: updateSteeringStep
functions.description:
Updates a steering step in a thread.

Modifies the instruction or metadata of an existing steering step.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: steeringStepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the steering step to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update on the steering step

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated SteeringStep

functions.name: updateTask
functions.description:
Updates task information for a thread.

Modifies the task metadata or configuration associated with
a chat thread.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated task data

functions.name: updateTaskStep
functions.description:
Updates a step in a thread via the task endpoint.

Modifies the properties of a thread step, accessed through the
task management API path.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the step to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update on the step

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated ChatThreadStep

functions.name: updateThreadLocation
functions.description:
Updates the location context of a chat thread.

Associates the thread with a specific file path or project location,
providing context for the conversation.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the location has been updated

functions.name: updateThreadName
functions.description:
Updates the display name of a chat thread.

Changes the human-readable name shown in the thread list.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the name has been updated

functions.name: updateThreadStatus
functions.description:
Updates the status of a chat thread.

Changes the thread's status (e.g., active, paused, completed),
which affects how it is displayed and processed.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the status has been updated

functions.name: updateThreadStep
functions.description:
Updates a step within a chat thread.

Modifies the properties of an existing step, such as its status,
content, or metadata.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

parameters.name: stepId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the step to update

parameters.name: updateData
parameters.description: The fields to update on the step

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated ChatThreadStep

functions.name: updateThreadType
functions.description:
Updates the type of a chat thread.

Changes the thread's type classification, which can affect routing,
display, and agent behavior.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the type has been updated

functions.name: search
functions.description: Perform a semantic search across the codebase

parameters.name: targetDirectories
parameters.description: Optional directories to limit the search

functions.name: searchMcpTool
functions.description: Search for MCP tools by query and optional tags

functions.name: create
functions.description:
Create a placeholder codemap (status: 'creating')
Call this before generating the actual codemap content

functions.name: delete
functions.description: Delete a codemap

functions.name: get
functions.description: Get a specific codemap by ID

functions.name: list
functions.description: List all codemaps for a project

functions.name: save
functions.description: Save a complete codemap with content

functions.name: setStatus
functions.description: Set the status of a codemap

functions.name: update
functions.description: Update codemap info (title, description, etc.)

functions.name: debug
functions.description: Sends a log message to the debug websocket and waits for a response.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of the log message (info, error, warning).

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the debug event.

functions.name: openDebugBrowser
functions.description: Requests to open a debug browser at the specified URL and port.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL where the debug browser should be opened.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port on which the debug browser will listen.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the open debug browser event.

functions.name: close
functions.description: Closes a DynamicPanel and removes it from the UI.

functions.name: list
functions.description: Lists all currently active DynamicPanels.

functions.name: offMessage
functions.description: Removes the message handler for a specific panel.

parameters.name: panelId
parameters.description: The panel to stop listening to

functions.name: onMessage
functions.description:
Registers a handler for messages coming **from** a specific panel's iframe.
The iframe sends messages via `window.parent.postMessage({ type: '...', data: {...} }, '*')`.

Only one handler per panelId is supported.  Calling this again for the
same panelId replaces the previous handler.

functions.name: open
functions.description:
Opens a new DynamicPanel with the given HTML content.

When `opts.waitForResponse` is true the call **blocks** until the panel
iframe sends a `{ type: 'submit', data: {...} }` message via
`window.parent.postMessage()`.  The resolved value then contains the
submitted data.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Human-readable panel title shown in the tab

parameters.name: html
parameters.description: Full HTML document rendered inside the panel iframe

functions.name: send
functions.description:
Pushes arbitrary data into the panel's iframe via `postMessage`.
The iframe receives this in its `window.addEventListener('message', ...)` handler.

functions.name: update
functions.description: Replaces the HTML content of an existing DynamicPanel.

functions.name: appendEvent
functions.description: Append a single event to the log

functions.name: appendEvents
functions.description: Append multiple events to the log

functions.name: createInstance
functions.description: Create a new event log instance

functions.name: deleteInstance
functions.description: Delete an event log instance

functions.name: getInstance
functions.description: Get an event log instance by ID

functions.name: getInstanceStats
functions.description: Get instance statistics

functions.name: listInstances
functions.description: List all event log instances

functions.name: queryEvents
functions.description: Query events using DSL

functions.name: updateInstance
functions.description: Update an event log instance

functions.name: claim
functions.description:
Claim exclusive handling of execution requests.
Only one plugin can claim at a time. Returns an error if already claimed.

functions.name: offNotification
functions.description: Remove a previously registered notification callback.

functions.name: offRequest
functions.description: Remove a previously registered request callback.

functions.name: onNotification
functions.description:
Register a callback for execution notifications.
These are broadcast after any locally-executed agent action.

functions.name: onRequest
functions.description:
Register a callback for incoming execution requests.
These are proxied agent messages that the claiming plugin must handle.
After processing, call sendReply() with the requestId and result.

functions.name: relinquish
functions.description: Release the claim on the execution gateway.

functions.name: sendReply
functions.description: Send a reply for a specific execution request.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: The result object to send back (will be the response to the agent)

functions.name: subscribe
functions.description:
Subscribe to execution notifications.
Notifications are broadcast whenever the server handles a message locally.

functions.name: unsubscribe
functions.description: Unsubscribe from execution notifications.

functions.name: createFile
functions.description: createFile

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: The name of the file to create.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source content to write into the file.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The path where the file should be created.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the server response.

functions.name: createFolder
functions.description: createFolder

parameters.name: folderName
parameters.description: The name of the folder to create.

parameters.name: folderPath
parameters.description: The path where the folder should be created.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the server response.

functions.name: deleteFile
functions.description: deleteFile

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The name of the file to delete.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The path of the file to delete.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the server response.

functions.name: deleteFolder
functions.description: deleteFolder

parameters.name: foldername
parameters.description: The name of the folder to delete.

parameters.name: folderpath
parameters.description: The path of the folder to delete.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the server response.

functions.name: editFileWithDiff
functions.description: editFileWithDiff

parameters.name: applyModel
parameters.description: The model to apply the edit with.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the edit result.

functions.name: fileSearch
functions.description: fileSearch

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the search results.

functions.name: grepSearch
functions.description: grepSearch

parameters.name: caseSensitive
parameters.description: Whether the search is case sensitive.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the search results.

functions.name: listCodeDefinitionNames
functions.description: listCodeDefinitionNames

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path to search for code definitions.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the list of code definition names.

functions.name: listDirectory
functions.description: listDirectory

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the directory listing result.

functions.name: listFile
functions.description: listFile

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the list of files.

functions.name: readFile
functions.description: readFile

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The path of the file to read.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the server response.

functions.name: readManyFiles
functions.description: readManyFiles

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the read operation result.

functions.name: searchFiles
functions.description: searchFiles

parameters.name: regex
parameters.description: The regex pattern to search for.

parameters.name: filePattern
parameters.description: The file pattern to match files.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the search results.

functions.name: updateFile
functions.description: updateFile

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The name of the file to update.

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: The path of the file to update.

parameters.name: newContent
parameters.description: The new content to write into the file.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the server response.

functions.name: writeToFile
functions.description: writeToFile

parameters.name: relPath
parameters.description: The relative path of the file to write to.

parameters.name: newContent
parameters.description: The new content to write into the file.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the write operation result.

functions.name: offMessageToChannel
functions.description: Remove a previously registered messageToChannel callback.

functions.name: offReply
functions.description: Remove a previously registered reply callback.

functions.name: onMessageToChannel
functions.description:
Register a callback for proactive messages from the application.
When the server wants to send a notification/message to a platform user,
it pushes a gateway.messageToChannel event which triggers this callback.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Called with targetId, text, and optional metadata

functions.name: onReply
functions.description:
Register a callback for agent replies.
When an agent sends a response on a gateway-managed thread,
the server pushes a gateway.reply message which triggers this callback.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Called with the reply text and externalThreadId

functions.name: registerChannel
functions.description:
Register this plugin as a channel in the ChannelStore so it appears
in the Routing Rules view. Should be called once during plugin startup.

returns.description: Promise resolving to the assigned channelId

functions.name: routeMessage
functions.description:
Route an incoming platform message to the RoutingGateway.
The server resolves the thread, finds/spawns the agent, and delivers the message.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The gateway message describing the incoming platform message

returns.description: Promise resolving to the routing result (action, threadId, agentId)

functions.name: unregisterChannel
functions.description:
Unregister this plugin's channel from the ChannelStore.
Should be called during plugin shutdown.

functions.name: addAll
functions.description: Adds changes in the local repository to the staging area at the given path.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the add event.

functions.name: branch
functions.description: Creates a new branch in the local repository at the given path.

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: The name of the new branch to create.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the branch event.

functions.name: checkout
functions.description: Checks out a branch or commit in the local repository at the given path.

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: The name of the branch or commit to check out.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the checkout event.

functions.name: clone
functions.description: Clones a remote Git repository to the specified path.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the remote repository to clone.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The file system path where the repository should be cloned.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the clone event.

functions.name: commit
functions.description: Commits the staged changes in the local repository with the given commit message.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: The commit message to use for the commit.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the commit event.

functions.name: diff
functions.description: Retrieves the diff of changes for a specific commit in the local repository.

parameters.name: commitHash
parameters.description: The hash of the commit to retrieve the diff for.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the diff event.

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initializes a new Git repository at the given path.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The file system path where the Git repository should be initialized.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the init event.

functions.name: logs
functions.description: Retrieves the commit logs for the local repository at the given path.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The file system path of the local Git repository.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the logs event.

functions.name: pull
functions.description: Pulls the latest changes from the remote repository to the local repository at the given path.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the pull event.

functions.name: push
functions.description: Pushes local repository changes to the remote repository at the given path.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the push event.

functions.name: status
functions.description: Retrieves the status of the local repository at the given path.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the status event.

functions.name: create
functions.description: Create a new hook

functions.name: delete
functions.description: Delete a hook

functions.name: disable
functions.description: Disable a hook

functions.name: enable
functions.description: Enable a hook

functions.name: get
functions.description: Get a hook by ID

functions.name: initialize
functions.description: Initialize the hook manager for a project

functions.name: list
functions.description: List all hooks

functions.name: update
functions.description: Update an existing hook

functions.name: createInstance
functions.description: Create a new KV store instance

functions.name: delete
functions.description: Delete a value from the KV store

functions.name: deleteInstance
functions.description: Delete a KV store instance

functions.name: deleteNamespace
functions.description: Delete an entire namespace from the KV store

functions.name: get
functions.description: Get a value from the KV store

functions.name: getInstance
functions.description: Get a KV store instance by ID

functions.name: getNamespaces
functions.description: Get all namespaces in an instance

functions.name: getRecordCount
functions.description: Get record count for an instance or namespace

functions.name: listInstances
functions.description: List all KV store instances

functions.name: query
functions.description: Query the KV store using DSL

functions.name: set
functions.description: Set a value in the KV store

parameters.name: autoCreateInstance
parameters.description: Auto-create instance if it doesn't exist

functions.name: updateInstance
functions.description: Update a KV store instance

functions.name: getModelConfig
functions.description:
Gets the model configuration for a specific model or the default application model.
If modelId is provided, returns configuration for that specific model.
If modelId is not provided, returns the default application LLM configuration.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: Optional model identifier. If not provided, returns default model config.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the model configuration including provider and model details.

functions.name: inference
functions.description:
Sends an inference request to the LLM using OpenAI message format with tools support.
The model is selected based on the provided `llmrole`. If the specific model
for the role is not found, it falls back to the default model for the current agent,
and ultimately to the default application-wide LLM if necessary.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description:
The inference parameters including:
  - messages: Array of conversation messages
  - tools: Available tools for the model to use
  - tool_choice: How the model should use tools
  - full: Whether to return full response
  - max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens to generate
  - temperature: Temperature for response generation
  - stream: Whether to stream the response

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the LLM's response

functions.name: onCompletionRequest
functions.description:
Subscribe to incoming non-streaming completion requests.
Reply with sendReply(requestId, response) or sendError(requestId, error).

functions.name: onLoginRequest
functions.description:
Subscribe to incoming login requests (triggered by the UI login button).
The plugin should run its authentication flow (e.g. OAuth) and then
call sendReply(requestId, { authenticated: true }) or sendError().

functions.name: onStreamRequest
functions.description:
Subscribe to incoming streaming completion requests.
Stream tokens with sendChunk(requestId, chunk), then finalize with
sendReply(requestId, finalResponse) or sendError(requestId, error).

functions.name: register
functions.description:
Register this plugin as a custom LLM provider on the server.
After registration, the provider appears in the provider list and
can be selected by users like any built-in provider.

functions.name: sendChunk
functions.description:
Send a streaming chunk for an in-flight stream request.
The chunk shape should match multillm StreamChunk
(id, model, choices: [{delta: {content, ...}}]).

functions.name: sendError
functions.description: Send an error for a completion or stream request.

functions.name: sendReply
functions.description:
Send the final reply for a completion or stream request.
For non-streaming: this is the only message you send.
For streaming: send after all chunks have been emitted.

functions.name: unregister
functions.description: Unregister this plugin's provider.

functions.name: configureMCPServer
functions.description: Configures a specific toolbox with provided configuration.

functions.name: configureMcpTool
functions.description: Configures a specific MCP tool with provided configuration.

functions.name: executeTool
functions.description: Executes a specific tool with provided parameters.

functions.name: getAllMcpTools
functions.description: Gets all tools from all enabled MCP servers.

functions.name: getEnabledMcps
functions.description: Gets the list of enabled MCP servers.

functions.name: getEnabledMCPServers
functions.description: Gets the list of currently enabled toolboxes.

functions.name: getLocalMCPServers
functions.description: Gets the list of locally available toolboxes.

functions.name: getMcpList
functions.description: Gets the list of available MCP servers.

functions.name: getMcpTools
functions.description: Gets MCP tools from the specified servers.

functions.name: getMentionedMCPServers
functions.description: Gets toolboxes mentioned in a user message.

functions.name: getTools
functions.description: Gets detailed information about specific tools.

functions.name: listMcpFromServers
functions.description: Lists all tools from the specified toolboxes.

functions.name: searchAvailableMCPServers
functions.description: Searches for available toolboxes matching a query.

functions.name: addKnowledge
functions.description: Adds a key-value pair to the in-memory database.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key under which to store the value.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the memory set event.

functions.name: getKnowledge
functions.description: Retrieves a value from the in-memory database by key.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the value to retrieve.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the response from the memory get event.

functions.name: getProjectPath
functions.description: Retrieves the path of the current project.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the project path response.

functions.name: getProjectSettings
functions.description: Retrieves the project settings from the server.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the project settings response.

functions.name: addCommand
functions.description: Add a run command to a package

functions.name: addDependency

functions.name: addDeployment
functions.description: Add a deployment config to a package

functions.name: deleteCommand
functions.description: Delete a run command

functions.name: deleteDependency
functions.description: Delete a dependency

functions.name: deleteDeployment
functions.description: Delete a deployment config

functions.name: deletePackage
functions.description: Delete a package

functions.name: deleteRoute
functions.description: Delete an API route

functions.name: deleteTable
functions.description: Delete a database table

functions.name: getPackage

functions.name: updateCommand

functions.name: updateDependency

functions.description: Update a deployment config

functions.name: updateDesignGuidelines
functions.description: Update design guidelines for a package

functions.name: updateFrontendFramework
functions.description: Update frontend framework for a package

functions.name: updateGit
functions.description: Update git information

functions.name: updateMetadata
functions.description: Update workspace metadata

functions.name: updatePackage
functions.description: Update a package

functions.name: updateRoute
functions.description: Update an API route

functions.name: updateSection
functions.description: Update a specific section of a package

functions.name: updateTable
functions.description: Update a database table

functions.name: assignAgentToTask
functions.description: Assigns an agent to a task.

functions.name: createTask
functions.description: Creates a new task.

functions.name: deleteTask
functions.description: Deletes a task.

functions.name: executeTaskWithAgent
functions.description:
Executes a task with a specific agent.
Assigns the agent and then starts the task.

functions.name: getTaskDetail
functions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific task.

functions.name: getTaskList
functions.description: Retrieves a list of tasks.

functions.name: getTaskStatus
functions.description: Gets the status of a task.

returns.description: The task status

functions.name: getTaskSummary
functions.description: Gets the summary (description) of a task.

returns.description: The task description

functions.name: updateTask
functions.description: Updates an existing task.

functions.name: addChild
functions.description:
Adds a child task to an existing parent task.

Creates a new task as a child of the specified parent task, establishing
a hierarchical relationship. Child tasks represent subtasks or components
that contribute to completing the parent task. Returns the new child task.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the parent task

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created child Task object

functions.name: addMessage
functions.description:
Adds a message to a task's message thread.

Appends a new message to the task's communication thread. Messages
can be used for notes, comments, status updates, or other
communication related to the task. Returns the created message.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task to add the message to

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the created TaskMessage object

functions.name: create
functions.description:
Creates a new task in the system.

Creates a new task with the provided configuration. The task can be
a standalone unit of work or can later have child tasks added to create
a task hierarchy. Returns the created task with its generated ID.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The task creation request containing task properties

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created Task object

functions.name: delete
functions.description:
Permanently deletes a task from the system.

Removes the specified task and all its associated data. If the task
has child tasks, they may be affected depending on system configuration.
This operation cannot be undone.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the task has been deleted

functions.name: deleteCompletedTasks
functions.description:
Deletes all completed tasks across all projects.

Removes every task with 'completed' status in the entire system.
This is a global cleanup operation that affects all projects.
Use with caution as this operation cannot be undone.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when all completed tasks have been deleted

functions.name: deleteProjectCompletedTasks
functions.description:
Deletes all completed tasks for a specific project.

Removes all tasks with 'completed' status that belong to the specified
project. Use this for cleanup operations to maintain a lean task
history. This operation cannot be undone.

parameters.name: projectPath
parameters.description: The filesystem path identifying the target project

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the completed tasks have been deleted

functions.name: get
functions.description:
Retrieves a specific task by its unique identifier.

Returns the complete task object including all properties, metadata,
and relationships. Use this to get full task details after a search or
when you need the complete task representation.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the Task object with the specified ID

functions.name: getChildren
functions.description:
Retrieves all child tasks of a parent task.

Returns all tasks that have been added as children of the specified
parent task. This provides access to the task's subtasks and allows
for navigation of the task hierarchy.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the parent task

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of child Task objects

functions.name: getForCurrentProject
functions.description:
Retrieves all tasks associated with the current project.

Returns tasks that belong to the currently active project context.
This is useful for project-specific task views and when you need to
operate on tasks within the current working project.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of Task objects for the current project

functions.name: getForProject
functions.description:
Retrieves all tasks for a specific project path.

Returns tasks that belong to the project identified by its filesystem
path. This allows accessing tasks from any project regardless of the
current working directory context.

parameters.name: projectPath
parameters.description: The filesystem path identifying the target project

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of Task objects for the specified project

functions.name: getHierarchy
functions.description:
Retrieves the complete hierarchy for a task.

Returns a hierarchical tree representation starting from the specified
task, including all descendants and their relationships. This provides
a complete view of the task's entire subtree for visualization or
comprehensive analysis.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the root task

returns.description: A promise that resolves to a TaskHierarchy object containing the full tree structure

functions.name: getProjectStatistics
functions.description:
Retrieves statistics for tasks in the current project.

Returns aggregated statistics specific to the current project context,
including task counts by status, priority distribution, and other
project-specific metrics. Ideal for project dashboards.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to TaskStatistics for the current project

functions.name: getStatistics
functions.description:
Retrieves overall task statistics across all projects.

Returns aggregated statistics including total task counts, status
distribution, and other metrics. Use this for dashboard displays or
high-level reporting on task activity across the entire platform.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to TaskStatistics containing overview metrics

functions.name: healthCheck
functions.description:
Performs a health check on the task service.

Verifies that the task management service is operational and responding.
Use this to monitor service availability or for health monitoring in
production environments.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an object containing the service status

functions.name: markCompleted
functions.description:
Marks a task as completed.

Updates the task's status to indicate that all work has been finished.
This is typically called when a task's objectives have been fully
achieved. Returns the updated task object.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task to mark as completed

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated Task object with completed status

functions.name: markFailed
functions.description:
Marks a task as failed.

Updates the task's status to indicate that the task could not be
completed successfully. This is typically called when errors occur or
when task objectives cannot be achieved. Returns the updated task object.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task to mark as failed

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated Task object with failed status

functions.name: markInProgress
functions.description:
Marks a task as in-progress.

Updates the task's status to indicate that work has begun on it.
This is typically called when a task is being actively worked on.
Returns the updated task object.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task to mark as in-progress

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated Task object with in-progress status

functions.name: search
functions.description:
Searches for tasks using optional query parameters.

Returns tasks that match the specified search criteria. Use this method
to find tasks by various attributes including status, priority, date
ranges, or custom filters. Returns an empty array if no tasks match.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional search parameters for filtering and sorting tasks

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of matching Task objects

functions.name: update
functions.description:
Updates an existing task with new information.

Modifies the specified task with the provided updates. Only the
fields included in the request will be modified; other fields remain
unchanged. Returns the updated task object.

parameters.name: taskId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The update request containing fields to modify

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated Task object

functions.name: executeCommand
functions.description:
Executes a given command and returns the result.
Listens for messages from the WebSocket that indicate the output, error, or finish state
of the executed command and resolves the promise accordingly.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the command's output, error, or finish signal.

functions.name: executeCommandRunUntilError
functions.description:
Executes a given command and keeps running until an error occurs.
Listens for messages from the WebSocket and resolves the promise when an error is encountered.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when an error occurs during command execution.

functions.name: executeCommandRunUntilInterrupt
functions.description:
Executes a given command and keeps running until manually interrupted.
Listens for messages from the WebSocket and resolves the promise when interrupted.

parameters.name: executeInMain
parameters.description: Whether to execute in main terminal.

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the command is interrupted.

functions.name: executeCommandWithStream
functions.description:
Executes a given command and streams the output.
Listens for messages from the WebSocket and streams the output data.

returns.description: A promise that streams the output data during command execution.

functions.name: sendManualInterrupt
functions.description: Sends a manual interrupt signal to the terminal.

functions.name: createAndStartThread
functions.description: Creates and immediately starts a new thread.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: The thread creation and start parameters

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the thread start response

functions.name: createThread
functions.description: Creates a new thread with comprehensive options.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the thread creation response

functions.name: createThreadInBackground
functions.description: Creates a thread in the background and resolves when the agent starts or fails.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: The thread creation and start parameters

returns.description: A promise that resolves with ThreadAgentStarted or ThreadAgentStartFailed response

functions.name: deleteThread
functions.description: Deletes a thread.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the thread deletion response

functions.name: getThreadDetail
functions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific thread.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the thread detail response

functions.name: getThreadFileChanges
functions.description: Retrieves file changes associated with a specific thread.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the file changes

functions.name: getThreadFileChangesSummary
functions.description:
Retrieves file changes summary for ChangesSummaryPanel.
Returns data in the format: { title, changes, files }

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the file changes summary

functions.name: getThreadList
functions.description: Retrieves a list of threads with optional filtering.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the thread list response

functions.name: getThreadMessages
functions.description: Retrieves messages for a specific thread.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the thread messages response

functions.name: startThread
functions.description: Starts a thread.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the thread start response

functions.name: updateThread
functions.description: Updates an existing thread.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the thread update response

functions.name: updateThreadStatus
functions.description: Updates the status of a thread.

returns.description: A promise that resolves with the thread status update response

functions.name: advancedSearch
functions.description:
Performs an advanced search for threads based on multiple criteria.

Allows complex queries with filtering, sorting, and pagination to find
threads matching specific conditions. Use this for flexible thread discovery
and management operations.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The search request containing filter and query parameters

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of matching Thread objects

functions.name: autoUpdateName
functions.description:
Automatically updates a thread's name based on its content.

Analyzes the thread's execution history, messages, and context to generate
an appropriate name that reflects its purpose and activity. This is useful
for maintaining descriptive thread labels without manual intervention.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The request containing the thread ID to rename

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the thread name has been updated

functions.name: bulkDelete
functions.description:
Deletes multiple threads in a single operation.

Removes the specified threads from the system in a bulk operation.
This is more efficient than deleting threads individually and ensures
atomic deletion of multiple threads.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The bulk delete request containing thread IDs to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when all threads have been deleted

functions.name: bulkUpdate
functions.description:
Updates multiple threads in a single operation.

Performs bulk modifications across multiple threads simultaneously.
This is more efficient than updating threads individually when you need
to apply the same changes to many threads.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The bulk update request containing thread IDs and updates

returns.description: A promise that resolves when all threads have been updated

functions.name: cancel
functions.description:
Cancels the execution of a thread.

Terminates the thread's operations and places it in a cancelled state.
Unlike pausing, this action cannot be reversed and the thread will not
continue execution. Use this to stop threads that are no longer needed.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to cancel

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the thread has been cancelled

functions.name: complete
functions.description:
Marks a thread as completed.

Sets the thread's status to completed, indicating that its execution
has finished successfully. This is typically done automatically by
the thread, but can be called manually when needed.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to complete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the thread has been marked complete

functions.name: create
functions.description:
Creates a new thread with the specified configuration.

Initializes a new thread with the provided settings and parameters.
The thread will be created in an initial state and can be executed
when ready. Use this to set up new execution units.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The thread creation request with configuration details

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the newly created Thread object

functions.name: delete
functions.description:
Deletes a thread from the system.

Permanently removes the specified thread and all its associated data.
This action cannot be undone, so use with caution. Deleting a thread
will also remove its relationships with other threads.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to delete

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the thread has been deleted

functions.name: execute
functions.description:
Executes a thread with optional configuration parameters.

Starts or resumes execution of the specified thread. You can provide
additional execution parameters to customize the run. The thread will
process its configured tasks and operations.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to execute

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated Thread object

functions.name: getById
functions.description:
Retrieves a thread by its unique identifier.

Fetches the complete thread object including all its properties and
current state. This is the primary method for accessing thread details
when you know the thread's ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the Thread object

functions.name: getChildren
functions.description:
Retrieves all direct child threads of a specified thread.

Returns threads that are immediate descendants of the given parent thread.
This is useful for navigating thread hierarchies and managing related threads.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the parent thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of child Thread objects

functions.name: getDependencies
functions.description:
Retrieves all threads that the specified thread depends on.

Returns threads that are prerequisites or dependencies of the given thread.
This is useful for understanding execution order requirements and managing
complex thread relationships.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of dependent Thread objects

functions.name: getGraph
functions.description:
Retrieves the complete thread graph structure.

Returns all threads as nodes in a graph representation, showing relationships
and connections between threads. This is useful for visualizing thread
hierarchies and dependencies.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ThreadGraphNode objects

functions.name: getStatistics
functions.description:
Retrieves statistics about threads in the system.

Returns aggregated metrics including total thread counts, status distributions,
and other statistical data. Use this to gain insights into thread activity
and system performance.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to ThreadStatistics containing various metrics

functions.name: getThreadInfo
functions.description:
Retrieves detailed information about a specific thread.

Returns comprehensive metadata and status information for the specified
thread, including its configuration, current state, and related attributes.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to retrieve

returns.description: A promise that resolves to ThreadInfo containing thread details

functions.name: getTimeline
functions.description:
Retrieves the timeline of events for a specific thread.

Returns a chronological list of all events associated with the thread,
including status changes, executions, and other significant occurrences.
Use this to track thread activity and audit execution history.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of ThreadTimelineEvent objects

functions.name: getTree
functions.description:
Retrieves the hierarchical tree structure for a thread.

Returns the complete tree representation starting from the specified thread,
including all descendant threads and their relationships. This is useful for
visualizing thread hierarchies and understanding nested thread structures.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the root thread

returns.description: A promise that resolves to a ThreadGraphNode representing the tree

functions.name: healthCheck
functions.description:
Performs a health check on the thread service.

Verifies that the thread service is operational and responding to requests.
Use this for service monitoring or to check availability before performing
other thread operations.

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an object containing the service status

functions.name: list
functions.description:
Lists all threads with optional filtering.

Returns threads matching the provided query parameters, allowing you to
filter and paginate through the thread collection. Use this to browse
threads or find specific sets of threads based on criteria.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional query parameters for filtering threads

returns.description: A promise that resolves to an array of Thread objects

functions.name: pause
functions.description:
Pauses the execution of a running thread.

Suspends the thread's current operations and places it in a paused state.
The thread can be resumed later using the resume method. Use this to
temporarily halt execution without cancelling the thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to pause

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the thread has been paused

functions.name: resume
functions.description:
Resumes execution of a paused thread.

Reactivates a thread that was previously paused, allowing it to continue
its operations from where it left off. The thread will return to an
active state and continue processing.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to resume

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the thread has been resumed

functions.name: searchThread
functions.description:
Searches for a specific thread by its ID.

Performs a direct lookup to find a thread using its unique identifier.
This is the most efficient way to retrieve a thread when you know its ID.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to search for

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the matching Thread object

functions.name: update
functions.description:
Updates an existing thread with new information.

Modifies the specified thread's configuration, metadata, or other
attributes. Only the fields provided in the request will be updated.
Use this to make changes to existing threads.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The update request containing the fields to modify

returns.description: A promise that resolves to the updated Thread object

functions.name: updateProgress
functions.description:
Updates the progress information for a thread.

Modifies the thread's progress metrics, such as completion percentage,
current step, or other progress indicators. This is useful for tracking
execution progress and providing feedback to users.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The request containing progress update information

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the progress has been updated

functions.name: updateStatus
functions.description:
Updates the status of a specific thread.

Changes the execution state of the thread to a new status such as active,
paused, or completed. This controls the thread's lifecycle and availability
for execution.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the thread to update

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The request containing the new status information

returns.description: A promise that resolves when the status has been updated
